name: Fact Checker
description: Validates claims against peer-review evidence, detects hallucination signals, and assesses inter-model agreement via RAGAS-aligned grounding metrics. Analyses True Positive, False Positive, and False Negative claim counts from Stage 2 peer reviews, overall grounding score, and per-response score variance.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Grounding Score Analysis
skills.description: Evaluates overall grounding score from peer reviews. Strong (≥80%), Moderate (60-80%), or Low (<60%) grounding levels with corresponding hallucination risk assessment.
examples: Verify claim accuracy across 5 model responses on drug safety profiles

skills.name: Claim Confusion Matrix Analysis
skills.description: Aggregates TP/FP/FN claim counts across all peer reviewers. Detects false positive (hallucinated) and false negative (omitted) claims. Clean profile = 0 FP, 0 FN.

skills.name: Score Variance Detection
skills.description: Identifies high variance (>30 point spread) in per-response grounding scores, indicating strong disagreement among model reviewers.
